title: Puzzle Bobble
prompt:
Create an original GameDetail hero illustration for a retro video game database entry.

Game metadata:
- Title: Puzzle Bobble
- Platform: Neo Geo
- Release year: 1994
- Genre: Puzzle, Abstract
- Mood: precise, calm, cerebral, dreamlike
- Context world: a physical puzzle space with stacked pieces, spatial logic, and grounded surfaces
- Central object: tile_stack
- Supporting objects: tile_stack, tile cluster, orb, frame marker
- Genre signal: spatial problem-solving with physical pieces

Visual goal:
- Deliver one image that reads in under two seconds
- Make the central object immediately readable and clearly tied to a game world
- Convey the genre instantly through the object, the environment, and the lighting
- Build a premium hero visual for a RetroDex GameDetail page

Composition:
- Place one large central object slightly left of center, isolate its silhouette clearly, and support it with a context scene that instantly explains the genre
- One strong focal point only
- No decorative geometry
- No empty backdrop

Platform style:
- premium arcade key art, dramatic contrast, dynamic framing, bold heroic silhouettes

Strict legal and safety constraints:
- Do NOT reproduce any official character, logo, box art, UI, screenshot, or sprite
- Do NOT imitate exact copyrighted visual designs
- Do NOT include any trademarked logo or title text inside the image
- Evoke only the atmosphere, object language, environment, and genre cues
- The result must be fully original and non-infringing in appearance

Output:
- High detail
- Premium editorial hero illustration
- No text
- No watermark
- Strong silhouette readability
- Clean overlay-safe lighting
negative_prompt: no official character likeness, no copyrighted costume replication, no original enemy designs, no game logo, no UI elements, no screenshot recreation, no exact box art composition, no branded symbols, no text, no abstract shapes, no decorative geometry, no empty background
legal_notes: Risk level low; use atmosphere, objects, and environments only. Downgrade if likeness risk rises.
